scripts.docker: docker build -t sure-companion-web . && docker run -d --init --name sure-companion-website -p 8080:80 sure-companion-web
scripts.docker:dev: docker build -f Dockerfile.dev -t sure-companion-web-dev . && docker run --rm --init -p 5173:5173 -v "$PWD/src:/app/src" -v "$PWD/public:/app/public" -v "$PWD/index.html:/app/index.html" sure-companion-web-dev
